import sys, os
os.chdir\(r''c:\\Users\\mailt\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Regtech\\backend''\)
sys.path.insert\(0, r''c:\\Users\\mailt\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Regtech\\backend''\)

vectorizer = VideoContentVectorizer\(\)

# First delete any old data for this video ID

# Process the new video
print\(''Processing video... this may take a few minutes...''\)
stats = vectorizer.process_video\(
    video_id=''test_video_003'',
    video_path=r''C:\\Users\\mailt\\Downloads\\Untitled design.mp4'',
    max_frames=50,
    process_audio=False,
    process_ocr=True
\)

print\(\)
print\(''=''*60\)
print\(''  PROCESSING COMPLETE''\)
print\(''=''*60\)
for k, v in stats.items\(\):
    print\(f''  {k}: {v}''\)
")

Bash("c:/Users/mailt/OneDrive/Desktop/Regtech/backend/venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
import cv2
cap = cv2.VideoCapture\(r''C:\\Users\\mailt\\Downloads\\WhatsApp Video 2026-02-17 at 12.20.19 PM.mp4''\)
fps = cap.get\(cv2.CAP_PROP_FPS\)
total_frames = int\(cap.get\(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_COUNT\)\)
duration = total_frames / fps
width = int\(cap.get\(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_WIDTH\)\)
height = int\(cap.get\(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_HEIGHT\)\)
cap.release\(\)

print\(f''Duration: {duration:.1f} seconds \({duration/60:.1f} minutes\)''\)
print\(f''Total frames in video: {total_frames}''\)
print\(f''FPS: {fps}''\)
print\(f''Resolution: {width}x{height}''\)
print\(f''We only extracted 50 frames = 1 frame every {duration/50:.1f}s''\)
print\(f''Last frame timestamp we captured: 38.16s''\)
print\(f''Video we MISSED: {duration - 38.16:.1f}s \({\(duration-38.16\)/duration*100:.0f}% of video\)''\)
")
